method: Playwright visual verification (headless Chromium via MCP)

checks.name: BOARDROOM no regression
checks.description: Open LENS in BOARDROOM mode — signal field, posture card, cockpit instruments render without regression

checks.name: DENSE zone tracking
checks.description: Switch to DENSE, scroll through actors — left column dynamically updates with zone-specific interpretation for all 6 zones

checks.name: DENSE right column paths
checks.description: Right column paths change per active zone — correct badge codes (ST/CC/AL/SA/PF/PZ) and correct path labels for all 6 zones

checks.name: Sticky column anchoring
checks.description: Left and right columns stay anchored (position:sticky at top:73px) while center column scrolls through multiple pages of content

checks.name: Guided BOARDROOM→DENSE transition
checks.description: BOARDROOM posture card row click opens DENSE focused on correct zone with scroll-to-target via rAF retry

checks.name: Topology modal portal
checks.description: TopologyModal renders via createPortal at document.body — no CSS containing block trap from ancestor transforms

checks.name: INVESTIGATION unchanged
checks.description: INVESTIGATION mode renders without regression — no zone paths, no overlays, no unwanted elements

checks.name: Narrative overlay hover
checks.description: Hover over DENSE traversal paths — narrative overlay appears with explanation, ANSWERS question, governance boundary for all 12 paths across 6 zones

checks.name: Narrative overlay dismiss
checks.description: Overlay disappears on mouse leave (CSS-only display:none ↔ block) — no flicker, no layout shift, no JS state

checks.name: Mode isolation
checks.description: BOARDROOM: 0 overlays in DOM, 0 zone paths. INVESTIGATION: 0 overlays in DOM, 0 zone paths

checks.name: Governance envelope
checks.description: Footer shows green dot + GOVERNANCE ENVELOPE ACTIVE, expandable details (inference/derivation/qualifier), collapses back, qualifier Q-02 visible

checks.name: SQO compact badge
checks.description: SQO section: compact badge (S2 + label), expands to full narrative (5 lines), collapses back, navigation block with hover border accent

checks.name: Signal continuity
checks.description: signalAssessment shows SIGNAL DECOMPOSITION with per-signal severity+interpretation, propagationFlow shows SIGNAL CONCENTRATION BY ROLE, pressureZoneFocus shows SIGNAL PRESSURE. Non-signal zones (semanticTopology) show 0 signal sections
